src/flit/platform/a11y_bridge

      • defaultProvider(root: Element): string

        setupMacAccessibility
      • setupMacAccessibility()

Accessibility platform bridge. Walks the flit Semantics tree and exposes it to platform-native accessibility frameworks.

Each platform has a different API:

  • macOS: NSAccessibility protocol on NSView
  • Linux: AT-SPI 2 via D-Bus
  • Windows: UIAutomation (UIA) provider
  • iOS: UIAccessibility informal protocol
  • Android: AccessibilityNodeInfo + AccessibilityNodeProvider

Implementing each natively is a multi-week project per platform. This module provides:

  1. A polling-based JSON exporter (exportSemanticsJson(root)) that any external test runner or assistive tech can consume.
  2. A registration hook (registerSemanticsProvider) for future per-platform integrations.
  3. A logging fallback that prints the tree on Cmd+Option+S so developers can verify their Semantics annotations.

Imports

../foundation/widget, ../foundation/semantics

Types

SemanticsProvider = proc (root: Element): string {.closure.}
Called by the runtime when assistive tech queries the tree. Returns a JSON-encoded SemanticsNode array (the same format as semantics.toJson).

Vars

activeProvider {.threadvar.}: SemanticsProvider
The current semantics provider, or nil for the built-in JSON exporter. Set via registerSemanticsProvider. 
lastSnapshot {.threadvar.}: string
The most recent semantics JSON that exportSemanticsJson returned. Exposed so external tooling (audit scripts, screenshot capture) can re-read without re-walking the tree.

Procs

proc defaultProvider(root: Element): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Default: walk the tree and serialize via toJson. 
proc dumpSemanticsToFile(root: Element; path: string = "") {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Writes the semantics tree to a file. Useful for inspection during development. Default path is /tmp/flit-a11y-<ts>.json. 
proc exportSemanticsJson(root: Element): string {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Returns the current semantics tree as JSON. Used by external tools (accessibility audits, screenshot generators with metadata, automated tests). 
proc exportSemanticsJsonInternal(root: Element): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Walks root's element tree and serializes the semantics nodes via semantics.toJson. Used as the default provider. Public so external bridges can call it directly. 
proc registerSemanticsProvider(provider: SemanticsProvider) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers provider as the source of truth for the semantics tree. Per-platform bridges should call this in their startup to override the default JSON exporter. 
proc setupMacAccessibility() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Placeholder for the macOS NSAccessibility integration. Today it just registers the default JSON provider; tomorrow this bridges to AXUIElement / NSAccessibility.
